message:
beads: file 4 in-flight bugs, close ft-sl1xk

Tracker catch-up for the in-flight fixes that just landed in this
session plus one closure for a bead that was resolved in a sibling
commit.

## Newly filed

- ft-761tz (in_progress): disk_pressure monitor fails closed on NaN
  samples. Bead body documents the three propagation paths (EwmaEstimator,
  PidController, classify_tier) and the "NaN -> GREEN" classifier bug
  that would silently report a healthy disk for an unreadable one.
  Addressed by this session's c5a02edb.

- ft-7ojbj (in_progress): parse_retry_after clamp at MAX_COOLDOWN_SECS
  to prevent Instant + Duration overflow panic. Addressed by this
  session's 7998d1a4.

- ft-ntvzq (in_progress): open scope for remaining rate-limit-tracker
  hardening — specifically follow-on work on record_event clamp + gc
  pass after MAX_COOLDOWN lands.

- ft-1p752 (open): filed for the error_renderer category serialization
  bug (Debug-format vs Serialize). Addressed by 1bb10288 in this
  session; left open pending a follow-up bead that audits all JSON
  emission sites for Debug-format leakage across the crate.

## Closed

- ft-sl1xk: closed (status flipped from in_progress -> closed). Bead
  body already captured the resolution context; marking here so the
  tracker reflects the up-to-date state on push.

Pure metadata. No source files in this commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
